feature_translations.implemented_as: line-to-line cadence_delta with syllable, stress, rhyme, and bar-span change
accent force score from stress density, landing stress, hard consonants, and content ratio
syncopation/twist score from off-grid stress positions and uneven stress gaps
repeated sound-loop score from internal rhymes, alliteration, and consonance
word states, pulse grid, sentence physics, and full-draft motion map
phonetic skeleton matching: consonant frame, vowel motion, stress signature, and ending sound

\u03c3.name: syllable
\u03c3.meaning: one spoken syllable unit inside the line

S.name: stress
S.meaning: estimated performance accent; primary/secondary stress becomes a rap landing

\u03b8.name: beat phase
\u03b8.meaning: where the syllable lands inside the current bar: 0.00=start, 1.00=end

\u03b2.name: bar index
\u03b2.meaning: estimated bar number or local bar span for the line

\u03b3.name: rhyme family
\u03b3.meaning: ending sound/rhyme key shared by end and internal words

\u03c4.name: torsion
\u03c4.meaning: syncopation/twist score: stress that bends away from the square pulse

F.name: accent force
F.meaning: how hard the phrase hits based on stress, hard consonants, and landing strength

\u0394C.name: cadence delta
\u0394C.meaning: change in syllable/stress/bar load from the previous editable line

\u03a9.name: spinning
\u03a9.meaning: repeated sound motion: internal rhyme, consonance, alliteration, and rhyme loops
